name: Notre Souffle Au Chocolat
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Semisweet chocolate, cut into small chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the coffee and half-and-half almost to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the chocolate until melted.
3. Heat the butter to bubbling.
4. Stir in the flour thoroughly.
5. Remove from heat and add the chocolate mixture, stirring well.
6. Beat the egg yolks with 3 tablespoons sugar and the salt until light.
7. Stir into the chocolate mixture. Set aside to cool.
8. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
9. Beat the egg whites with the cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
10. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon sugar and beat until incorporated.
11. Fold the egg whites into the cooled chocolate mixture.
12. Prepare 4 individual souffle cups by buttering the bottoms and sides, then swishing 1 teaspoon granulated sugar into each.
13. Pour out any excess sugar.
14. Place the batter in cups and bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until well puffed and lightly browned. Serve immediately.
